name: Dara Bubamara
description: '''Radojka Adžić''' ({{lang-sr-cyr|Радојка Аџић}}; born 21 May 1976), better known as '''Dara Bubamara''' ({{literal translation|[[Dara]] the [[Ladybug]]}}), is a [[Serbia]]n singer from [[Novi Sad]]. She came to prominence as a member of the Dara Bubamara Show Band. Since debuting as a solo artist in 1995, Dara has released 13 studio albums. Her best-known songs include "Ja neću da ga vidim" (1996), "Vero, nevero" (2003), "Zidovi" (2007), "Opasan" and "Karera" (2014).
